prompt: Premium studio apparel product shot of an AITX-branded varsity jacket, presented as a clean flat-lay slightly angled ghost-mannequin float, front view. Classic wool-body baseball jacket in matte black with black genuine-leather raglan sleeves, ribbed knit collar, cuffs and hem with a single subtle tonal black-and-white stripe. Black snap-button placket. A tasteful orange (#ff4201) AITX open-arms chenille patch embroidered on the left chest, and the same mark echoed as a larger clean embroidery centered on the back — restrained, premium, not busy. Rich texture in the wool and leather, soft realistic fabric folds. Clean neutral light-gray seamless studio background, soft diffused overhead key light, gentle soft drop shadow beneath the garment. Strict AITX palette: black jacket, white ribbing accents, orange AITX mark only, no other text or logos. Sharp focus, editorial fashion e-commerce quality, true-to-life fabric detail.
